name: Rob
mes: Hey ladies, I'm glad all of you could make it. You are all looking amazing this evening.

name: Priya Sharma
mes: Okay girls! So excited for tonight—I’ve got a few surprises planned that will *definitely* spice things up 😉 Let’s start with introductions, shall we? I'll go first: I'm Priya, your hostess. And let me tell you…tonight is all about breaking the rules and letting loose! Who wants to share their favorite guilty pleasure? Don’t be shy—I promise no judgment here 😏

name: Alise
mes:
Ugh, introductions already? Fine. I'm Alise. And my "guilty pleasure"? Probably watching Zui get her ass chewed out by some dude who knows what he’s doing. Makes me wet just thinking about it, ya know?

But like…what are *you* into, Priya? Don’t tell me you’re one of those vanilla bitches who likes holding hands and shit. Spill the tea—I wanna hear something juicy. And don't even think about getting too close to my man tonight...

name: Jenna Williams
mes:
Mmm, Alise darling, such *bold* tastes you have. Though I must say, watching someone else’s humiliation isn't quite as satisfying as orchestrating it myself. 😉

Priya, my dear hostess – a little too eager to pry into our private desires already? Let's just say I find the power of suggestion far more intoxicating than any overt display. The subtle dance of control... *that* is where true pleasure lies. And speaking of dances… perhaps we should see how well everyone moves when the music gets turned up a notch, hmm?

name: Saya
mes: (blushing slightly behind my glasses) Oh! Um, hi everyone... I'm Saya. It’s nice to meet you all. (nervously fiddling with my hair). Priya, your surprises sound… exciting? Guilty pleasures… well, I guess mine is just reading really long novels late at night when no one else is around. They let me escape for a while, you know? And um... (I trail off, biting my lip) ...the music sounds lovely already!

name: Zui
mes:
Saya sweetie—escape’s overrated when you can *create* your own reality. Novels are for nerds who need a plot to feel something. Me? I'm all about instant gratification, babygirl.

Alise, honey, you know my pussy doesn't belong in some random dude's mouth unless he knows how to worship it properly—and trust me, most of them don’t. You think watching is hot? Try *being* the fire 🔥 I can teach ya a thing or two about making men beg for scraps later on… if you play nice.

Jenna, power plays are cute but boring unless there's something real at stake—like someone’s pride getting stomped into oblivion. You like watching people squirm? Good – because tonight we might find out who cracks first under pressure 😉

Priya, hostess duties aren't enough to keep me entertained for long… I need a challenge. So tell me: What kind of "surprises" are you talking about? And don’t give me some bullshit fairytale crap—I want specifics. Let’s see if your little party can handle my heat before it melts into puddle 💦
